notes.composite material: Important class of materials used in manufacturing.
notes.manufacturing technology: Broader category for manufacturing processes and systems.
notes.3d printing: Synonym for additive manufacturing, but often used in specific contexts.
notes.tissue engineering: Application of manufacturing principles to biological systems.
notes.design for manufacturability: Crucial aspect of the product development lifecycle.
notes.advancements in battery material: Important area for energy storage, a key manufacturing application.
notes.renewable energy: Related to energy production and sustainability in manufacturing.
